final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: e-commerce hero image, square crop
Primary request: MacBook Pro on minimalist white marble desk with creative software on screen, wireless earbuds and coffee cup nearby
Scene/backdrop: clean studio desk setup, pure white marble surface, subtle window reflection
Subject: MacBook Pro laptop with screen showing creative software interface, sleek wireless earbuds case, ceramic coffee cup with latte art
Style/medium: product photography, tech aesthetic, editorial commercial
Composition/framing: top-down angled shot, wide composition showing full desk arrangement, soft depth of field
Lighting/mood: natural soft light from left window, bright and airy, clean shadows
Color palette: pure white marble, silver MacBook, warm wood accents, neutral cream coffee tones
Materials/textures: polished marble veins, brushed aluminum laptop, matte ceramic cup, glossy earbud case
Constraints: keep MacBook Pro as central hero product, maintain clean uncluttered composition
Avoid: cluttered background, harsh artificial lighting, color cast, fingerprints on screen
